---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in Mint Android SDK
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 📱 Environment

- **Mint SDK Version:**  
- **Android Version:**  
- **Device Model:**  
- **Integration Method:** (Gradle / JitPack / Local AAR)
- **App Target SDK:**  

---

## 📋 Description

A clear and concise description of the issue.

Example:
> App crashes when opening Portfolio screen after login.

---

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce

1. Initialize Mint SDK
2. Login with user credentials
3. Open Portfolio screen
4. Crash occurs

---

## ✅ Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

Example:
> Portfolio screen should load successfully.

---

## ❌ Actual Behavior

Describe what actually happened.

Example:
> App crashes with `NullPointerException`.

---

## 📸 Screenshots / Screen Recording (Optional)

Attach screenshots or screen recordings if applicable.

---

## 📜 Logs

Please attach relevant logs.

Example:
E/MintSDK: java.lang.NullPointerException
at com.investwell.mint.PortfolioActivity.onCreate


---

## 📦 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
